---
title: 'Basic Introduction to Soul Ties'
date: '2019-06-08T08:11:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2511372046218605667'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/basic-introduction-to-soul-ties.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.greatbiblestudy.com/soulties.php">http://www.greatbiblestudy.com/soulties.php</a>  <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Basic Introduction to Soul Ties<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br />  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-784766-150bfc152505.png"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700051417537757010" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-784766-e67d38008ac4.png" /></a><br />  <a href="http://www.greatbiblestudy.com/index.php">Home</a> &gt; <a href="http://www.greatbiblestudy.com/soulties.php">  Basic Introduction to Soul Ties</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;">
<hr align="center" noshade="" size="3" style="color: #a10104;" width="100%" />
</div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>What a soul tie is<o:p></o:p></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
The Bible speaks of what is today known as soul ties. In the Bible, it doesn't use the word soul tie, but it speaks of them when it talks about souls being knit together, becoming one flesh, etc. A soul tie can serve many functions, but   in it's simplest form, it ties two souls together in the spiritual realm. Soul ties between married couples draw them together like magnets, while soul ties between fornicators can draw a beaten and abused woman to the man which in the natural realm she would   hate and run from, but instead she runs to him even though he doesn't love her, and treats her like dirt. In the demonic world, unholy soul ties can serve as bridges between two people to pass demonic garbage through. I helped a young man not too long ago   break free from downright awful visitations from demons, all due to an ungodly soul tie he had with a witch. The man was a Christian, and the only thing that allowed her to send demonic torment his way, is through the soul tie. Other soul ties can do things   such as allow one person to manipulate and control another person, and the other person is unaware to what is going on or knows what is going on, but for no real reason, allows it to continue.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>How soul ties are formed<o:p></o:p></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
I believe there are other ways which soul ties are formed, but here are some that I am aware of.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Sexual relations:</b> Godly soul ties are formed when a couple are married (Ephesians 5:31, "For this cause shall a man leave his father and mother, and shall be joined unto his wife, and they two shall be one flesh."), and the Godly   soul tie between a husband and the wife that God intended him to have is unbreakable by man (Mark 10:7-9). However, when a person has ungodly sexual relations with another person, an ungodly soul tie is then formed (1 Corinthians 6:16, "What? know ye not that   he which is joined to an harlot is one body? for two, saith he, shall be one flesh."). This soul tie fragments the soul, and is destructive. People who have many past relationships find it very difficult to 'bond' or be joined to anybody, because their soul   is fragmented.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Close relationships:</b> King David and Jonathan had a good soul tie as a result of a good friendship (1 Samuel 18:1, "And it came to pass, when he had made an end of speaking unto Saul, that the soul of Jonathan was knit with the soul   of David, and Jonathan loved him as his own soul."), but bad soul ties can form from bad relationships as well. Idolizing somebody can cause a bad soul tie.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
I have heard too that you can create a soul tie with a rock group by becoming obsessed with their music. Which explains the strong pull towards certain music that seems almost irresistible.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Vows, commitments and agreements:</b> Vows are known to bind the soul (Numbers 30:2), marriage itself consists of vows and binds the two people together (Ephesians 5:31), therefore I have little reason to overlook the concept of vows   or commitments as being a means to create a soul tie.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>How to break a soul tie<o:p></o:p></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
1. If any sins were committed to cause this soul tie, repent of them! Fornication is perhaps one of the most common ways to create nasty soul ties.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
2. If gifts were given to you by the other person in connection with the sin or unholy relationship, such as rings, flowers, cards, bras, etc. I would get rid of them! Such things symbolize the ungodly relationship, and can hold a soul   tie in place. If you are still friends or in a relationship (just now it's no longer an ungodly relationship), like say a boyfriend/girlfriend relationship, except you've repented of and forsaken the unholy practices you used to do in your relationship, then   I don't feel it is necessary to destroy all the gifts and things that you have been given. I would still encourage you to get rid of anything that symbolizes the ungodly practices in the relationship though, such as if a guy gives a girl a bra and panties   with his initials on them during fornication. I wouldn't encourage you to hang on to such things that symbolize sin or that are wrong to give each other before marriage. Things such as flowers and love letters given during an adultery should be destroyed.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
3. Any rash vows or commitments made that played a part in forming the soul tie should be renounced and repented of, and broken in Jesus' name. Even things like "I will love you forever", or "I could never love another man!" need to be   renounced. They are spoken commitments that need to be undone verbally. As Proverbs 21:23 tells us, "Whoso keepeth his mouth and his tongue keepeth his soul from troubles." The tongue has the ability to bring the soul great troubles and bondage.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
4. Forgive that person if you have anything against them.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
5. Renounce the soul tie. Do this verbally, and in Jesus' name. Example, "In Jesus' name, I now renounce any ungodly soul ties formed between myself and ______ as a result of _______________ (fornication, etc.)."<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
6. Break the soul tie in Jesus' name! Do this verbally using your authority in Jesus. Example, "I now break and sever any ungodly soul ties formed between myself and _________ as a result of ______________ (fornication, etc.) in Jesus'   name."<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Additional recommended reading<o:p></o:p></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Seductions Exposed - The spiritual dynamics of relationships (Dr. Gary L. Greenwald)</b><br />  AWESOME book that takes you behind the scenes of soul ties, transferring of spirits, and how the enemy can use various things to gain a 'bridge' into our souls.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Triage Associate | Account Protection  <o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Alliance Data  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">751 W Hanley, Coeur dâ€™Alene, ID 83815<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.knowmoresellmore.com/"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">knowmoresellmore.com</span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">   | </span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/2973795?trk=tyah"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">LinkedIn  </span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/KnowMoreSellMore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Facebook</span></a><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://twitter.com/know_sellmore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Twitter</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
</div>
<br clear="both" />
______________________________________________________________________<br />
The information contained in this e-mail message and any attachments may be privileged and confidential. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient or an agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachments from your computer.<br />
______________________________________________________________________
